chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 94 of 2002 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.16/2011 (1 Rule 10) 2. For hearing of CMA No.06/2011 (Intervenor) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.437/2002 (S/A) 03-10-2022 Syed Jaffer Ali Shah, Advocate for the Applicants Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Respondent No.1 Ghulam Rasool present in person <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the applicants as well as learned AAG Sindh after arguing the matter at some length seek disposal of this Civil Revision Application in terms that since the subject Masjid is “House of Almighty Allah”, whose administration is in the hands of Ahle-Sunnat Sect. no muslim person shall be restrained to perform prayers. Order accordingly. The Civil Revision Application stands disposed of along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
